name: franciscoteixeira/tiny-s3
description: A minimal AWS S3-compatible storage server written in pure PHP

scripts-descriptions.start: Start the built-in PHP development server on :8080
scripts-descriptions.test: Run the full test suite (no coverage)
scripts-descriptions.test:unit: Run only the Unit testsuite (fast, no server)
scripts-descriptions.test:integration: Run only the Integration testsuite (starts a real PHP server)
scripts-descriptions.coverage: Run full suite WITH coverage — requires Xdebug (XDEBUG_MODE=coverage) or PCOV
scripts-descriptions.coverage:ci: CI mode: coverage reports + JUnit XML in coverage/
